summary: The current reference preserves the selected generated image as a screenshot but does not yet implement the visual-gallery screen as editable HTML/CSS. The ideal shows a complete learning-lab interface with top navigation, featured optimization workbench, learning path, topic filters, widget cards, and resource affordances; the actual screenshot is a minimal wrapper with a header and one image-backed section.

majorDiffAreas.title: Reference is still image-backed instead of editable gallery UI
majorDiffAreas.expected: Editable DOM sections should recreate the Visual Gallery page: brand/navigation, hero title, featured optimization workbench, learning path, filters, widget cards, and notebook/Colab/chapter actions.
majorDiffAreas.actual: The mockup contains a compact context header and a single section whose main content is the selected generated reference image.
majorDiffAreas.impact: The target cannot be used for downstream implementation polish because Limner can only compare a screenshot facsimile, not editable UI regions or real asset usage.

evidence.observation: Only five text blocks are detected, including 'Selected generated reference image', while the ideal contains many page modules and controls.
The source-reference section contains only an img tag pointing at source-reference.png.

majorDiffAreas.recommendedChange: Replace the image-backed source frame with editable HTML/CSS modules using the verified book cover and local widget GIFs, preserving the ideal's guided-workbench hierarchy and resource affordances.

matches: The current palette already gestures toward warm paper, navy, and gold.
The title and target identity match the selected Visual Gallery page family.
The reference shell uses the correct selected generated image as visual guidance.
The current wrapper uses an academic serif heading and restrained color palette.
uncertainties: Exact chapter mapping for every widget should remain conservative because the local chapter data is partial.
possibleIntentionalDeviations: The screenshot-backed frame was an intentional first-pass scaffold, but it now needs replacement with DOM modules.

inputQuality: Comparison inputs are sufficient for the next scoped mockup edit.

nextIteration.focus: Convert the Visual Gallery reference from screenshot-backed scaffold to real editable HTML/CSS.
steps: Build a full page shell with visible Machine Learning Refined identity and top navigation.
Create a featured optimization workbench using the local normalized-gradient-descent GIF and real Chapter/Notebook/Colab affordances.
Create a learning path, topic filters, and eight widget cards using only local widget GIF assets and verified resource labels.
avoidForNow: Do not invent fake chapter counts, fake recommendations, or fake screenshots.
Do not use the generated reference image as a production asset.
nextIteration.expectedImprovement: The next comparison should expose real DOM structure and visual regions corresponding to the selected reference instead of a single screenshot-backed image.

rationale: The acceptance notes explicitly require replacing image-backed zones with editable DOM sections. The current implementation has the right target image but lacks the key page anatomy needed for Limner's next iteration.
